titleStmt.title: SII 27.48: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 48. (A.R. No. 114 of 1935-36.) KAṬLETALA, PUTTUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in front of the well called the Pustaka-tīrtha.
This damaged record registers an endowment of land for burning a perpetual lamp in the maṭha of Kaṭlavāḍi, a hamlet of Nayirāḍi, by Mādarasa who was governing Maṅgaḷūru-rājya.

It is dated Śaka 1282, Plava, Mēsha 5, Sunday. The details are irregular. The cyclic year Plava corresponded with the Śaka year 1283 when the given tithi fell on 1361 A.D., March 30, the weekday being Tuesday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī śakavaruṣa 1282 neya plava saṁvatsarada
mēṣamāsa 5 neya Ā . śrīvīra bukkaṇavoḍeyaru rājya
va nāḷuva kāladalu maṁgalūra rājyavanū mādarsaru Ā
ḷuvalli Ā mādarsaru māḍida dharmmakartta nayirāḍi noḷagaṇa kaṭli
vāḍiya maṭhada dēvarige naṁdādīvige ¬ kke kalpisidatāvu peruvaya
lu pilikuḍalu sahita bittuva bedekāru lamēlu sidāya ga ¬ nū
Aḍavimēle bahakīḷu mēlu sahita dhāreya neṟadukoṭu barasikoṭṭa śi
lā śāsana kramaveṁtaṁdaḍe Ābhūmīya mēle Arasiṁge sēsesidā
ya kīḷu mēlunaṭṭu bēḍu bīḍu bīya tapu hoḍikke haḍike bi
sage U hāya vodalāgi Avudūyilla sarbbamānyavāgi Ā ma
ṭhada dēvarige naṁdādīvige saluvu ya bhūmiyamēle Āvanā
nobbanu yiḷidu yettake cārisidaḍe
Avanānobbaru
Arasugaḷu Aḷapidaḍe vāraṇāsiyalu sāvirakavi
leyaṁ brāhmaṇaraṁ koṁda dōṣa dharmavanaḷida pāpayi dha
rma Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyiyāgi naḍavahāṁge
Aura śilāśāsanamaṁ barasikoṭṭu
māḍida mādarasara maṁgaḷa mahāśrī sēnabō
vara baraśrī .
Digital edition of SII 27.48 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
